titleStmt.title: SII 7.262: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 262. (A.R. No. 84 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP AT THE ENTRANCE INTO THE BAYILANGADI MELE-BASTI AT PADUVA-PANAMBUR, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādā mōghalāṁchanaṁ . jīyātu trailōkya
nāthassa śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . 1 bhuvanāṁbhōjamā¨rttyaṁḍaṁ bhavyāmṛtapa
yōdharaṁ.yōgikalpataruṁ navumi dēvadēvaṁ vṛṣadhvajaṁ . 2 jayatyamēyya
māhātmyaṁ viśāśitakuśāśanaṁ . śāśanaṁ jainamudbhāsi muktilakṣmīśa
śāśanaṁ . 3 svasti śrī.vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣa 1464 neya saṁ
da va¨rttamāna subhakṛtu saṁvatsarada siṁhamāsa 13 neya Ādivāradalu śrīmadanaṁ
tatī¨rtthēśvarapādāraviṁdadvaṁdvaniraṁtarasēvāsama[¨r*]ttanijani¨rmmalacittamaṁgaḷaruṁ A
Udhā¨ryyavī¨ryyagāṁbhī¨ryyādyanaṁtaguṇaratnaratnākararuṁ dīnajanayikaciṁ
tāmaṇigaḷuṁ bhavyaśirōmaṇigaḷu mappa śrīmatkiṁnnika sāmaṁtaraḷiya duggaṇna
sāvaṁtaru taṁna kāladalli tamage niraṁtarābhyudayaniśśrēyasaphalasiddhinimittavāgi
śrīmadabhiThe letter bhi is engraved above the line.navacārukī¨rttipaṁḍitadēvarugaḷa paramōpadēśaviḍidu śrīmadanaṁtatī¨rtthēśvarara
nityanaimityaka Abhiṣēka pūjāvidhānaṁgaḷige nityāhāradānaṁgaḷigu taṁma Akka
ceṁnamadēviyaru taṁma mūrusāvira Āḷu yeraḍu nakarada samasta halara Anu
mathadiṁda Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyiyāgi biṭṭa brahmadāyada vivaraveṁtene . Ucilada
bayalalu Aḍukatōḍi timaro 1 kke baḷa 40 lekkada Akki muḍe 14 pāritimaro 1 kke
Akki muḍe 26 Adara mūḍaṇagadde ye 2 kke Akki mūḍe 18 koḷake gadde ye 2 kke Akki
mūḍe 30 kedutimaro 1 kke muḍe 13 kaṁgitemaro 1 kke muḍe 6 koggi gadde 1 muḍe 4
naḷiyetimaro 1 kke mūḍe 3 kalli timaro 1 kke muḍe 5 Uddina gadde ye 2 kke muḍe 6 . Uddi
nagadde mu 2 kke mūḍe 15 maragiṇiṁda Akki muḍe 11 paḍuvaṇa Uciladalli bayala
gadde 3 beṭṭubāgilu gadde saha 2 kke saha Akki muḍe 38 nāyaka beṭṭinallikuḍutima
ru 1 tāḷitaḍitimaru 1 baḷikaṁḍa ye 2 saha gadde 4 kke Akki muḍe 12 bōḷate
maru 1 kke muḍe 7 Aṁtu muḍe 204 Āhāradānakke biṭṭa sthaḷa nāgaṇakoṁ
me saṁkarana bāḷiṁda Akki muḍe 76 Aṭṭila kruṣṇana bāḷiṁda Akki muḍe 24 madhyamaṁ galakke
citrāpuvina kēśapelāyana bāḷiṁda Akki muḍe 12 Aṁtu 40 lekkada muḍe 313
kke naḍava dha¨rmmada vivara Anaṁtenātha namṛtapaḍige Akki muḍe 50 mūṟutaṁḍa dēhā
rakke muḍe 22 vṛṣabhatī¨rtthakara Amṛtapaḍige muḍe 1 hāladhārege muḍe 2 paṁcā
mṛta śōḍaṣa bhāvaneya prathamadina habbada pūje vigādi pāḍya jīvadayāṣṭami śivarā
tre Aṣṭāhnikagaṁdha saha Iṁtivakke saha Akki mūḍe 40 madyamaṁgalakke muḍe 12 mēla
ṇa neleya dēhārada Āmṛtapaḍige muḍe 40 ratnatrayadēhārakke muḍe 10 nityanaimi
tyakakke muḍe 20 hāladhārege muḍe 4 maṁdharada hāladhārege muḍe 4 Aḍipige muḍe 18 tī¨rttha
karabhastiya Amṛtapaḍige Akki muḍe 40 cāra 5 kke Akki muḍe 50 Iṁtivara Ubayānma tadiṁ
Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāIyāgi māḍikoṁḍa śāsanakke Iṁtivarugaḷu dha¨rmmaṁgaḷanu mā
ḍi kī¨rttipuṇyavanupā¨rjjisikoṁḍaru . Iṁtī dha¨rmmaṁgaḷige trikaraṇa śuddhiyiṁ Aḷipidavarige dhareyuḷa kālatanakayō ya naraka nitya ni
da duḥkhakke bhājanaraharu. Ū¨rjjayaṁtagiriyalu navakōṭi munīśvarara koṁda pāpa . mattaṁ vāraṇāśiyalu navakōṭi saṁnyāsigaḷa
koṁda pāpa.mattaṁ 18 ghaṭṭadalu Iḷiva 18 sāvirakavileya koṁda pāpa . ruṣivadhe brahmavadhe bālavadhe strīvadhe paśuvadhe paṁca
mahāpātaka pakke hōharu . svadatāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēcca vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 7.262 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
